title: UK records its hottest June day and France its hottest day ever as heatwave sweeps Europe
summary: Temperature of 36.1C (97F) recorded in Hampshire, while two-thirds of Europe’s population experience temperatures above 30CThe UK has broken its all-time temperature record for June and France has recorded its hottest day ever for the second day running, as a heatwave affecting more than 90 million people sweeps across swathes of Europe.As the UK and France registered record-breaking temperatures, the World Health Organization warned that the extreme temperatures are “putting lives at risk”. title: Presentation: Rules for Understanding Language Models
summary: Naomi Saphra discusses 5 rules governing language model behavior, breaking down why LLMs act like populations rather than individuals. By Naomi Saphra
